exercises.title: SPKI Encoder
exercises.description: Build a SubjectPublicKeyInfo encoder for PQC algorithms.
exercises.expectedOutput: Working SPKI encoder producing valid DER
hints: Length uses short form for <128, long form otherwise
First two OID components encoded as 40*a + b
BIT STRING needs unused bits prefix (usually 0x00)
Test with openssl asn1parse for validation

exercises.title: Composite Certificate Builder
exercises.description: Create a tool to build composite/hybrid X.509 certificates.
tasks: Encode both classical and PQC keys
hints: Use composite OID for algorithm identifier
Keys are encoded as SEQUENCE of SPKI

exercises.title: Certificate Size Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate and compare certificate sizes for different algorithms.
tasks: Define size parameters for all algorithms
hints: Factor in common certificate fields (~200 bytes)

exercises.title: OID Registry
exercises.description: Create a comprehensive PQC algorithm OID registry.
tasks: Document all NIST PQC algorithm OIDs
Add key and signature size metadata
exercises.expectedOutput: Complete OID registry with lookup functions
hints: Include all ML-KEM, ML-DSA, and SLH-DSA variants
Include both string and tuple representations
